headline: Looks Like M&A Week in 3 Different Sectors
summary: Some large merger & acquisition deals that could shake up the consumer goods and the food distribution industry, plus deals in the healthcare industry.

headline: Sysco CIO to depart as C-suite turnover continues
summary: Tom Peck joined the food distributor in 2021, tasked with leading a massive digital transformation. He’s leaving just as the company faces another pivotal moment.
